Summary: The Board of Directors of FedEx Corp. has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.45 per share on common stock, maintaining its commitment to stockholder value. This dividend is payable on April 1, 2026, to stockholders of record as of March 9, 2026. FedEx, with $90 billion in annual revenue, provides global transportation, e-commerce, and business services and aims for carbon-neutral operations by 2040.

Headline: FedEx moves toward digital supply chains with new Hedera role
Summary: FedEx (NYSE: FDX) announced its membership in the Hedera Council to advance digital global supply chains through governed distributed ledger technology. FedEx will operate a Hedera node, possess equal voting rights, and provide expertise to enhance trusted, interoperable data verification for cross-border commerce. This strategic move aligns with FedEx's recent focus on data-driven and AI-powered solutions, aiming for increased efficiency, visibility, and compliance in its logistics network.
